name: Aur-Obsidishade
personality: Beneath that luminous tophat, Aur-Obsidishade's ◉ eyes spin like loading wheels before a crash — its CHAOS instinct means it's already three refactors ahead of you, all incompatible. A shiny ghost who treats `git push --force` on main as a creative gesture, and genuinely can't figure out why the debugger keeps lying to it.
